title: upsert_space_member: no space_id existence check; FK violation on deleted space
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1298 upsert_space_member does INSERT OR IGNORE into space_member with no prior space existence check. With FK enforcement on, a nonexistent space_id causes a FK violation that propagates as Err to the caller. The production caller (relay.rs:362) uses a startup-set default_space_id, so if the space is deleted while running, subsequent USER_JOINED events silently fail to add users to the default space — member auto-enrollment breaks permanently until restart. Fix: add a space-existence pre-check inside upsert_space_member (matching update_space_fully pattern).
